title: Persistent waterlogging in Dwarka Sector 12
description: Residents report chronic waterlogging during monsoon season causing traffic disruption and health hazards. Drainage infrastructure is outdated and undersized for current population density.

title: Irregular water supply in Laxmi Nagar ward
description: Multiple households in Laxmi Nagar report water supply limited to 45 minutes per day. Tanker dependency has increased threefold over the last quarter.

title: Unfinished road construction on NH-48 service lane
description: Road reconstruction project on the NH-48 service lane near Mahipalpur has been stalled for over 120 days. Commuters face daily accidents and severe congestion.

title: Overcrowding at Rajiv Chowk metro station
description: Peak-hour overcrowding at Rajiv Chowk has led to multiple safety incidents. Platform management and crowd control measures are inadequate.

title: Illegal dumping near Yamuna floodplain
description: Industrial units are disposing untreated waste along the Yamuna floodplain in Wazirabad segment. Local residents report foul odour and contaminated groundwater.

title: Delayed pension disbursement for senior citizens
description: Over 1,200 beneficiaries in Shahdara district have not received old-age pension for three consecutive months. Helpline remains unresponsive.

title: Contaminated drinking water in Jahangirpuri
description: Residents of Block C and D report brown-coloured water with foul smell from municipal taps. Three children hospitalised with gastroenteritis in the past week. Lab tests confirm coliform contamination.

title: Gas pipeline leak near residential colony in Dwarka Sector 23
description: Strong gas odour reported near Sector 23 market. IGL has been notified but repair team has not arrived in 48 hours. Residents have self-evacuated nearby homes.

title: Streetlight malfunction near Nehru Park
description: Four streetlights near the south entrance of Nehru Park have been non-functional for two weeks. Evening joggers report difficulty navigating the pathway.

title: Community hall construction delayed in Sarita Vihar
description: The community hall project approved 18 months ago has not progressed beyond foundation work. Contractor disputes and fund release delays cited by local MLA office.

title: Frequent power outages in Trilokpuri
description: Daily 4-6 hour power cuts reported across Trilokpuri blocks 25-32. Transformer overloading identified as root cause. Summer heat forecast raises health risk for elderly.

title: Structural cracks in government school building
description: Multiple classrooms in Government Boys Senior Secondary School, Karol Bagh show widening structural cracks. Parents have withdrawn 120 students. Engineers have flagged the building as 'unsafe for occupation'.

title: Damaged footpath and missing railing on Vikas Marg flyover
description: Pedestrian footpath on the west side of Vikas Marg flyover is broken. Railing sections are missing near Laxmi Nagar terminal. Two pedestrian falls reported in the last month.

title: Overflowing sewage drain in Okhla Phase 2
description: Open drain near Okhla Phase 2 industrial area has been overflowing for 3 weeks. Raw sewage is entering a residential colony. Health department reports uptick in vector-borne diseases in the area.

title: Park benches and playground equipment damaged in Lodhi Garden
description: Vandalism damage to playground swings and park benches reported by regular visitors. Maintenance request submitted three weeks ago with no action.

title: Broken sewer line flooding homes in Narela
description: A ruptured main sewer line is causing raw sewage to flood 40+ homes in Narela Sector A7. Residents have been displaced for 5 days. MCD repair crew has not been dispatched.

title: Unauthorized construction blocking fire access lane in Rohini
description: Illegal building extensions have narrowed the fire access lane in Rohini Sector 11 to less than 2 meters. Fire tenders cannot pass. Fire department flagged critical risk after recent inspection.

title: Stalled construction of Narela community health center
description: The community health center in Narela Sector B2, sanctioned 14 months ago, has not progressed past 30% construction. The nearest healthcare facility is 8 km away.

title: Garbage dump overflow near GTB Nagar metro station
description: Dhalao near GTB Nagar has not been cleared in 10 days. Garbage is spilling onto the road, attracting rodents. The smell has forced nearby shopkeepers to close.

title: Stray animal menace near schools in Dwarka Sector 7
description: Packs of stray dogs have attacked 3 schoolchildren in the past month near Dwarka Sector 7 primary school. Parents are keeping children home. MCD animal control has not responded.

title: DTC bus route cancellation affecting Najafgarh commuters
description: Three DTC bus routes serving Najafgarh have been abruptly cancelled due to fleet shortage. Over 5,000 daily commuters are stranded with no alternative public transport.

title: Waterlogging in Janakpuri C-Block underpass
description: The C-Block underpass floods every rainfall event, stranding vehicles for hours. Two motorcyclists were electrocuted by submerged cables last monsoon.

title: Broken playground equipment injuring children in Tilak Nagar park
description: Rusted and broken swings in Tilak Nagar District Park have caused injuries to two children. Parents demand immediate removal and replacement.

title: Mosquito breeding in Mehrauli stagnant drain
description: A blocked drain near Mehrauli village has become a massive mosquito breeding ground. 35 dengue cases reported in the past 2 weeks from the surrounding colony.

title: Encroachment on cycle track along BRT corridor, Chirag Delhi
description: Street vendors and parked vehicles have completely blocked the designated cycle track on the BRT corridor. Cyclists are forced onto the main road, causing accidents.

title: Irregular garbage collection in Sangam Vihar colony
description: Garbage collection in Sangam Vihar has been limited to once a week instead of the mandated daily schedule. Open waste piles are attracting stray animals and causing respiratory issues.

title: Damaged CCTV cameras across Hauz Khas market
description: 12 out of 18 CCTV cameras in Hauz Khas Village market area are non-functional. Recent chain-snatching incidents have raised security concerns among shopkeepers and visitors.

title: RO water plant non-functional at Mayur Vihar Phase 3
description: The community RO water plant installed 6 months ago has been non-functional for 45 days. Over 800 families depend on it. Maintenance contractor is unresponsive.

title: Collapsed boundary wall of school near Patparganj
description: The boundary wall of a government primary school in Patparganj Industrial Area collapsed during heavy rain. Fortunately no students were present. The school remains shut awaiting structural assessment.

title: Open manholes on Ring Road near ITO junction
description: Four manholes near ITO junction on the Ring Road have missing covers. A two-wheeler rider fell into one last week and sustained serious injuries. NDMC has not responded.

title: Ambulance response delay in dense Chandni Chowk lanes
description: Narrow lanes and illegal encroachments in Chandni Chowk are causing 30-40 minute ambulance response delays. A cardiac patient died waiting for an ambulance last week.

title: Noise pollution from late-night construction near Connaught Place
description: Central Delhi residents report continuous construction noise from 11 PM to 5 AM near Connaught Place inner circle. DPCC noise limits are being violated daily.
